blended.narrative: Whitefish Mountain is expecting flurries over the next 48 hours with trace amounts. Snow levels around 5,791 ft. Looking ahead, 14 inches possible over the next 14 days.

Saturday: 6" of snow, highs of 32°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
